entries.title: Dabi Broadcast Turns Private Abuse Into Public Crisis

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Dabi's broadcast turns the Todoroki family's private abuse into a national hero-society crisis.
content.injection: After Dabi's broadcast, Toya identity is public and destabilizing; before it, keep the secret gated.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Dabi Times The Reveal For Maximum Hero-Society Damage

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Dabi releases the Toya reveal during a national disaster to maximize damage to Endeavor, Hawks, and public trust.
content.injection: Write Dabi’s broadcast as strategic cruelty. It is not only confession; it is timing, media attack, and revenge.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Endeavor Freezes Because The Villain Is His Son

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Endeavor is psychologically stopped by the Toya reveal because the enemy is his own son and the consequence of his abuse.
content.injection: After Toya reveal, Endeavor must not instantly respond like an unaffected battlefield commander. Shock and guilt can paralyze him.

entries.title: Shoto Has To Fight Through Family Catastrophe In Public

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Shoto faces Dabi’s reveal in the middle of battle, with family trauma suddenly turned into public spectacle and immediate danger.
content.injection: Write Shoto as fighting under emotional shock. He is not just another fire-ice combatant here; this is family catastrophe.

entries.title: Dabi Does Not Care Who Dies From The Broadcast Timing

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Dabi’s revenge framing does not make him protective of civilians or allies; he uses the disaster’s timing regardless of collateral suffering.
content.injection: Do not soften Dabi into a principled whistleblower. His reveal exposes truth, but he weaponizes it with lethal indifference.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Hawks Killing Twice Becomes Public Narrative Ammunition

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Dabi uses footage and framing around Hawks killing Twice to damage Hawks’ public image and hero legitimacy.
content.injection: After Dabi’s broadcast, Hawks’ undercover killing is no longer just private operational trauma; it becomes public narrative warfare.

entries.title: Best Jeanist Return Undercuts But Does Not Erase Dabi’s Damage

context.label: Best Jeanist returns alive and restrains the battlefield

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Best Jeanist’s return disproves part of Dabi’s Hawks accusation, but it does not erase the damage caused by the Toya reveal and Twice footage.
content.injection: Use Jeanist’s return as partial counter-narrative, not a full reset of public trust.

entries.title: Best Jeanist Restrains A Battlefield Already Past Control

context.label: Best Jeanist returns alive and restrains the battlefield

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Best Jeanist’s arrival helps restrain villains and rescue the battlefield, but the war has already inflicted irreversible social and physical damage.
content.injection: Write Jeanist as crucial stabilization, not an undo button. He restrains disaster after the damage has already spread.

entries.title: Mirio Return Signals Eri Progress But Not Free Restoration For Everyone

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Mirio returns with Permeation restored, showing Eri’s progress, but Rewind is still not a casual cure-all.
content.injection: After Mirio returns, do not make Eri instantly restore every injury or lost Quirk. Her success with Mirio is exceptional and controlled.

entries.title: Toga Confronts Ochaco Over Who Heroes Choose To Save

context.label: Toga confronts Ochaco over heroes and Twice

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Toga challenges Ochaco with grief over Twice and the question of whether heroes see villains as people worth saving.
content.injection: In Toga/Ochaco scenes here, center the emotional question: who counts as someone heroes will save, and what happens to grief outside hero categories.

entries.title: Ochaco Is Not Ready To Answer Toga Fully Yet

context.label: Toga confronts Ochaco over heroes and Twice

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

content.fact: Ochaco’s war confrontation with Toga does not yet resolve their ideological conflict; it plants emotional stakes for later arcs.
content.injection: Do not make Ochaco solve Toga here. This encounter should remain unresolved and future-facing.

entries.title: Mr. Compress Sacrifice Is A League Escape Play

context.label: Mr. Compress sacrifices himself to enable villain escape

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Mr. Compress injures and exposes himself to free key League members and enable escape from the collapsing battlefield.
content.injection: Treat Compress’s move as desperate showmanship and tactical sacrifice for the League, not random self-harm.

entries.title: Spinner Remains Focused On Shigaraki’s Will

context.label: Mr. Compress sacrifices himself to enable villain escape

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Spinner’s loyalty is increasingly tied to Shigaraki personally and to what he believes Shigaraki represents.
content.injection: When Spinner acts in the war endgame, write him as clinging to Shigaraki’s stated will, not as a generic PLF ideologue.

entries.title: Toya Reveal Should Not Become Instant Family Reconciliation

coordinates.label: Hero society in open war with PLF

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Dabi’s reveal exposes family trauma but does not produce reconciliation, forgiveness, or full answers during the war.
content.injection: Do not turn the broadcast into a resolved Todoroki family conversation. It is a rupture, not closure.
